value.opFormWeekText: ${(()=>{const v=row.outp_date;if(!v)return '';const p=String(v).split('-').map(Number);const d=p.length===3?new Date(p[0],p[1]-1,p[2]):new Date(v);return Number.isNaN(d.getTime())?'':['星期日','星期一','星期二','星期三','星期四','星期五','星期六'][d.getDay()]})()}

action.title: 请选择班次并填写大于0的限号数

value.atime_rows: ${(()=>{const flag=String(atime_flag||'0');const duration=String(outp_duration_code||'');if(flag!=='1'||!duration)return [];const atimeTouched=Array.isArray(opFormChangedFields)&&opFormChangedFields.some(f=>f&&f.field==='atime_rows');if(atimeTouched&&Array.isArray(atime_rows)&&atime_rows.length)return atime_rows;const configs=['2-9','10-12','13-19','20-33','34-1','34-33'];const point=configs[Number(duration)-1]||'';const parts=point.split('-').map(v=>Number(v));if(parts.length<2||!parts[0]||!parts[1])return [];const codes=[];const add=(a,b)=>{for(let i=a;i<=b;i+=1)codes.push(i);};if(parts[0]<=parts[1]){add(parts[0],parts[1]);}else{add(parts[0],48);add(1,parts[1]);}const pad=n=>String(n).padStart(2,'0');const fmt=m=>pad(Math.floor((m/60)%24))+':'+pad(m%60);const time=q=>{const start=q<=33?450+(q-1)*30:(q-34)*30;return [fmt(start),fmt(start+30)];};const dist=(total,len,idx)=>{const n=Math.max(0,Number(total||0));return len?Math.floor(n/len)+(idx<n%len?1:0):0;};const touched=Array.isArray(opFormChangedFields)&&opFormChangedFields.some(f=>f&&f.field==='appointment_limits');const reg=Number(registration_limits||0);const app=(!touched&&reg>0&&!Number(appointment_limits||0))?reg:Number(appointment_limits||0);const reserve=Number(transfer_no||0);const internet=Number(internet_limits||0);return codes.map((q,idx)=>{const t=time(q);const timeLimits=dist(reg,codes.length,idx);const appointmentLimits=dist(app,codes.length,idx);const reserveLimits=dist(reserve,codes.length,idx);const internetLimits=dist(internet,codes.length,idx);return {__rowId:'atime_'+duration+'_'+q,time_quantum:String(q),sort_no:idx+1,item_name:t[0]+'-'+t[1],stage_begin_time:t[0],stage_end_time:t[1],time_limits:timeLimits,appointment_limits:appointmentLimits,reserve_limits:reserveLimits,internet_limits:internetLimits,current_time_limits:timeLimits,current_appointment_limits:appointmentLimits,current_reserve_limits:reserveLimits,current_internet_limits:internetLimits,time_status:'0'};});})()}

value.opFormDeptCode: ${value && specialClinicSelected && specialClinicSelected[0] && Array.isArray(deptOptions) && deptOptions.some(d => d.value === specialClinicSelected[0].reside_dept_code) ? specialClinicSelected[0].reside_dept_code : opFormDeptCode||''}

value.reside_dept_code: ${value && specialClinicSelected && specialClinicSelected[0] && Array.isArray(deptOptions) && deptOptions.some(d => d.value === specialClinicSelected[0].reside_dept_code) ? specialClinicSelected[0].reside_dept_code : opFormDeptCode||''}

value.opFormWeekText: ${(()=>{if(!value)return '';const p=String(value).split('-').map(Number);const d=p.length===3?new Date(p[0],p[1]-1,p[2]):new Date(value);return Number.isNaN(d.getTime())?'':['星期日','星期一','星期二','星期三','星期四','星期五','星期六'][d.getDay()]})()}

${(()=>{const v=selection[0].outp_date;if(!v)return '';const p=String(v).split('-').map(Number);const d=p.length===3?new Date(p[0],p[1]-1,p[2]):new Date(v);return Number.isNaN(d.getTime())?'':['星期日','星期一','星期二','星期三','星期四','星期五','星期六'][d.getDay()]})()}
